heading: Authority of President to obtain release
label: 1311 Authority of President to obtain release
text: For the use or benefit of the Federal Government, the President may obtain from an individual or officer to whom land has been or will be conveyed a release of the individual’s or officer’s interest to the Government.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)131140:305.R.S. § 3752.
